rationale.R1.2: The agent output identifies multiple load-bearing inconsistencies and proposes minimal repairs, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags some uncertainties but does not mark confidence for each recommendation explicitly.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope of logical consistency review without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original content.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced but minor edits lack source and reason annotations.
